svg.title: AutoPR Engine — 7-Stage Autonomous Pipeline
svg.desc: Flowchart showing seven pipeline stages from Repo Ingestion through PR Generation, with a self-reflection loop and confidence scoring layer.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Repo Ingestion stage of AutoPR Engine')
sendPrompt('Explain the Code Understanding Engine stage of AutoPR Engine')
g.text: Dep graph · entry points · flow map · module summary

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Issue Detection Engine stage of AutoPR Engine')
sendPrompt('What bug types does AutoPR detect?')
sendPrompt('What code smells does AutoPR detect?')
sendPrompt('What performance issues does AutoPR detect?')
sendPrompt('What security vulnerabilities does AutoPR detect?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Prioritization Engine of AutoPR')
g.text: Score: severity · fix simplicity · risk · contribution value

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Fix Generation Engine of AutoPR')
g.text: Minimal diff patches · style-preserving · no rewrites

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Validation Layer of AutoPR Engine')
g.text: Logic check · no breaking changes · mental sim · test run

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the PR Generation Engine of AutoPR')

svg.text: User can explore repo · approve/reject fixes · guide priorities interactively
